$comment: Season dossier pack S07, The Spending War (Horsepower War act). Season-scoped coverage for the year money became the story: chequebook war at the summit, counted coins at the floor, and a paddock that kept proving the flag is not for sale. Ids are stable rendezvous keys, never rename. Read-side only: editing this file changes display, never replay.

templates.headline: THE SPENDING WAR: the entry list reads like a ledger
templates.deck: Gold freight at the summit, counted coins at the floor
templates.summary: Season seven opens with the richest teams in open chequebook war and the widest gap the circus has ever known.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The first number of the season was not a lap time. It was a figure with too many zeroes, announced by one gold garage and answered by two more, and the spending war was declared before a wheel turned. The gap between the summit and the LEVEL D floor has never been wider, and it has never been more resented.
sections.context: The rich run fresh power every Sunday; the floor rebuilds the same tired unit and calls it a programme. Between them sits a paddock that still believes the stopwatch cannot read a bank statement. {pool:paddockBuzz}
sections.close: Sixteen rounds to find out what gold can buy, and what it cannot.

templates.headline: {subject} WINS[[?venue: at {venue}]], the one thing money cannot buy
templates.deck: The freight rolls past, the flag stays free

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every spare car, every qualifying special, every crate of fresh engines came to nothing against sixty laps of driving. {subject} wins[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the spending war gets its weekly reminder that the flag is the one item no budget line covers. {pool:swCrowd}
sections.stats: {pool:rrStatLine} [[?champPosition: The board reads {ord:champPosition} for {subject}, purchased at the old price: talent.]]

templates.headline: {subject} on the podium[[?venue: at {venue}]], worth every coin it did not cost
templates.deck: The champagne tastes different on a tight budget

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} There are podiums the gold garages buy in bulk, and there are podiums like this one: {subject} on the rostrum[[?venue: at {venue}]] with half the paddock's respect and none of its invoices. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: POLE for {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]], earned, not invoiced
templates.deck: The clock still refuses to read bank statements

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The qualifying specials came out with their fresh rubber and their fresh engines, and the number at the top still belongs to {subject}. Pole[[?venue: at {venue}]] in the spending war is a line item no accountant can authorise. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: Sunday is longer and more expensive. The number is only the down payment.

templates.headline: {subject} leads the spending war, and the summit is not for sale
templates.deck: Top of the board in the most expensive season ever run
templates.summary: {subject} took the championship lead in season seven.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} In the year the paddock priced everything, the top line of the big board stays priceless. {subject} leads the championship, and the gold garages below are learning the difference between buying speed and owning Sundays. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: The freight will keep rolling. The lead answers to a different currency, and it is called the chequered flag.

templates.headline: {subject} coasts out[[?venue: at {venue}]], the tired unit gives its last
templates.deck: The oldest engine on the floor runs out of rebuilds

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Some garages bolt in fresh power every Sunday. Some garages nurse the same engine like a family heirloom, and today the heirloom came apart under {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]]. The driver did nothing wrong; the budget did it for him. {pool:wrenchNote}
sections.context: This is the spending war's quietest column: the retirements that were decided in a bank office in January. {pool:swLadder}
sections.close: The crew strips it down one more time. There is no other engine coming.

templates.headline: {subject} in the wall[[?venue: at {venue}]], an overdraft of ambition
templates.deck: The wall charges no interest and gives no credit

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The spending war has one account nobody can top up: grip. {subject} spent more than the tyres had in the bank[[?venue: at {venue}]], and the armco collected immediately, in full, with no appeals department. {pool:swCrowd}
sections.close: The repair bill lands on a garage that counts every coin. The driver walked away; the ledger limps.
